query:
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.subscriptionTier, t.subscriptionStatus, t.stripeSubscriptionId, t.stripeCustomerId, t.onboardingCompleted 
FROM tenants t 
JOIN users u ON u.tenantId = t.id 
WHERE u.email LIKE '%coreydenzel%' OR u.name LIKE '%coreydenzel%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT t.id, t.name, t.subscriptionTier, t.subscriptionStatus, t.stripeSubscriptionId, t.stripeCustomerId, t.onboardingCompleted
